philosophy: A null model is a FALSIFIER targeting ONE named false explanation, NOT decorative rigor. A result that survives a null only counts as information if the null genuinely could have killed it. A null with no genuine target false explanation is decorative and is REJECTED.

null_families.target_false_explanation: The detected signal is merely an artifact of attaching any structure to the outcome labels, not of the specific outcome-aligned structure.
null_families.non_applicable_reason: label permutation applies to every substrate: each has an outcome series whose label-to-position alignment can be destroyed while the label multiset is preserved.
null_families.seed_policy: deterministic; numpy.random.default_rng(seed); same seed -> same permutation
null_families.rejection_test: if post-null preserves position-wise alignment -> null is a no-op -> REJECT
null_families.expected_failure_mode: if substrate signal survives this null, the signal is NOT an artifact of arbitrary structure attachment

null_families.target_false_explanation: The signal is merely a window-alignment artifact; it would appear under any equally-sized window placement, not specifically the crisis window.
null_families.non_applicable_reason: the contagion-proxy substrate is a graph/cascade substrate without a single onset-aligned time window to shift; its applicable temporal null is the shock-time placebo (N9).
null_families.seed_policy: deterministic; circular np.roll by a seed-derived shift in [1, n-1]
null_families.rejection_test: if shift maps the series onto itself (no-op roll) -> REJECT
null_families.expected_failure_mode: if substrate signal survives this null, the signal is NOT a window-placement artifact

null_families.target_false_explanation: The signal is just iid noise; its apparent temporal dependence is a spurious artifact rather than genuine autocorrelated structure.
null_families.non_applicable_reason: the contagion-proxy substrate output is a network-cascade observable, not an autocorrelated scalar time series; block bootstrap on it would not target the iid-noise false explanation honestly.
null_families.seed_policy: deterministic; seeded moving-block resample (block_len default n/8)
null_families.admission_test: lag-1 autocorrelation of the surrogate stays within the source autocorrelation band
null_families.rejection_test: if the surrogate equals the source series -> no global reordering -> REJECT
null_families.expected_failure_mode: if substrate signal survives this null, the signal carries dependence beyond iid noise

null_families.target_false_explanation: The signal is a linear-spectral artifact fully explained by its power spectrum and amplitude distribution, with no genuine nonlinear structure.
null_families.non_applicable_reason: IAAFT operates on a scalar time series' periodogram; the contagion-proxy substrate is a graph-cascade substrate with no single periodogram to surrogate.
null_families.seed_policy: deterministic; seeded initial permutation then iterative amplitude-adjusted FT (n_iter default 100)
null_families.admission_test: spectral correlation(surrogate, source) >= 0.90 AND surrogate value distribution == source value distribution (exact)
null_families.rejection_test: if surrogate == source series -> no phase randomisation -> REJECT
null_families.expected_failure_mode: if substrate signal survives this null, the signal has nonlinear structure beyond its linear spectrum

null_families.target_false_explanation: The detected signal is merely an artifact of the node degree distribution, not of the specific edge placement.
null_families.non_applicable_reason: funding_liquidity_rollover and volatility_credit_spread_regime are time-series substrates with no graph adjacency to rewire; degree-preserving rewiring is undefined for them.
null_families.admission_test: post-null degree sequence == pre-null degree sequence (EXACT, not approximate)
null_families.rejection_test: if post-null preserves edge placement -> null is a no-op -> REJECT
null_families.expected_failure_mode: if substrate signal survives this null, the signal is NOT degree-driven

null_families.target_false_explanation: The signal is driven only by the multiset of edge-weight magnitudes, not by which edge carries which weight.
null_families.non_applicable_reason: time-series substrates have no weighted edge set; permuting edge weights is undefined for them.
null_families.seed_policy: deterministic; seeded permutation of the edge-weight vector over the fixed topology
null_families.admission_test: post-null sorted(edge_weights) == pre-null sorted(edge_weights) AND binary topology unchanged
null_families.rejection_test: if the weight vector is unchanged (no permutation) -> REJECT
null_families.expected_failure_mode: if substrate signal survives this null, the signal depends on weight placement, not just magnitudes

null_families.target_false_explanation: The signal is generic to any random graph with this degree sequence, not specific to the observed network's edge structure.
null_families.non_applicable_reason: time-series substrates have no degree sequence to match; the configuration model is undefined for them.
null_families.seed_policy: deterministic; seeded stub-matching with self-loop/multi-edge rejection
null_families.admission_test: post-null degree sequence == pre-null degree sequence (EXACT)
null_families.rejection_test: if post-null edge set == observed edge set -> not a generic-graph draw -> REJECT
null_families.expected_failure_mode: if substrate signal survives this null, the signal is specific to the observed network, not generic to its degree sequence
null_families.h_i2_note: D-002I H_I2 (M3 topology-conditioned over-fit) is UNKNOWN. This topology-conditioned null carries h_i2_conditional=true: if D-002I H_I2 is later SUPPORTED, this null requires fresh admissibility justification before canonical use (P8).

null_families.target_false_explanation: The signal is an artifact of a dense-network representation and disappears under a realistic sparsity budget.
null_families.non_applicable_reason: time-series substrates have no network density to constrain; a sparse max-entropy reconstruction is undefined for them.
null_families.seed_policy: deterministic; seeded uniform draw over sparse configurations with exactly the observed edge count
null_families.admission_test: post-null total edge count == pre-null total edge count (sparsity budget held)
null_families.rejection_test: if post-null edge set == observed edge set -> not a fresh max-ent draw -> REJECT
null_families.expected_failure_mode: if substrate signal survives this null, the signal is NOT a dense-network artifact
null_families.h_i2_note: D-002I H_I2 (M3 topology-conditioned over-fit) is UNKNOWN. This topology-conditioned null carries h_i2_conditional=true: if D-002I H_I2 is later SUPPORTED, this null requires fresh admissibility justification before canonical use (P8).

null_families.target_false_explanation: The signal exists at any arbitrary time, not specifically at the true crisis/shock onset time.
null_families.non_applicable_reason: every substrate has a true shock/onset index whose alignment can be relabelled to a random placebo; applies universally including the graph-cascade substrate.
null_families.seed_policy: deterministic; seeded random placebo onset index distinct from the true onset
null_families.admission_test: exactly one onset in the placebo indicator AND the underlying series values are unchanged
null_families.rejection_test: if placebo onset == true onset -> not a placebo -> REJECT
null_families.expected_failure_mode: if substrate signal survives this null, the signal is tied to the true crisis time, not arbitrary times

null_families.target_false_explanation: The signal is a look-ahead (vintage leakage) artifact that only exists because future information bled into the present feature.
null_families.non_applicable_reason: every substrate emits a causal observable into which a look-ahead trap can be injected; this is the P3/PC5 leakage-sentinel bridge null and applies universally.
null_families.seed_policy: deterministic; fixed look-ahead shift (leak_lookahead default 1); no RNG draw needed
null_families.admission_test: the look-ahead arm differs from the causal arm (the trap is genuinely re-introducing leakage)
null_families.rejection_test: if the look-ahead arm == causal arm -> trap is a no-op -> REJECT
null_families.expected_failure_mode: INVERTED: PASS iff the signal DISAPPEARS in the leakage-free (causal) arm; a signal that persists only in the look-ahead arm is a leakage artifact (bridge to P3 leakage sentinel / PC5).
